advice.generic: Arcane Bolt is a spare-interrupt random-target nuke; kick it when higher priority casts are covered.
advice.healer: Spot heal targets if casts get through.
advice.dps: Use spare interrupts after Polymorph/Pyroblast/Terror Wave priority casts are handled.

468966.name: Polymorph

advice.generic: Polymorph is preventable with an interrupt; if it lands, remove it immediately so the player is not locked out during mechanics.
advice.healer: Magic dispel Polymorph quickly unless a more lethal dispel is happening at the same time.
advice.dps: Interrupt the cast; if a teammate is polymorphed and you can dispel, help immediately.

468966.notes: CC from a missed interrupt; dispel quickly if the cast completes.

1214038.name: Ethereal Shackles

advice.generic: Ethereal Shackles roots players during movement-heavy moments; remove with Magic dispel, freedom, or root break.
advice.tank: If shackled as tank, use a root break or call for dispel so you can keep boss/puddles positioned.
advice.healer: Dispel shackled players quickly, especially before Arcane Expulsion or ground effects force movement.
advice.dps: Use personal root breaks/freedom if available; otherwise call it and avoid wasting movement tools while rooted.

1214038.notes: Boss Magic root. Dispel or break the root around overlapping mechanics.

advice.generic: Arcane Expulsion knocks the group and drops a long-lasting puddle under the boss; place it on edges or overlap old puddles to preserve room.
advice.tank: Move the boss so each Expulsion drops at the edge/old puddles and use terrain to manage knockbacks.
advice.healer: Top players before Expulsion and be ready if Shackles overlaps with the knockback.
advice.dps: Do not stand between the boss and bad space; recover quickly after the knockback.

advice.generic: Void Torrent splits the arena with a beam; avoid the beam and pre-split the group so both sides can catch Unstable Void Essence soaks.
advice.tank: Keep your position predictable so both sides of the beam remain playable.
advice.healer: Be ready to heal both sides of the split; line/range may matter while the beam is active.
advice.dps: Respect the pre-split and catch your side’s soaks instead of crossing late through the beam.

advice.generic: If targeted by Astral Grasp, run away from the pull-in and avoid the circles appearing around clones.
advice.healer: Watch the grasp target during the pull and clone-circle overlap.
advice.dps: Move early; do not wait until the pull has already dragged you into circles.

advice.generic: Suppression Zone is used intentionally for Wave of Silence, but it silences/pacifies while inside. Step in just before the cast finishes, then leave.
advice.tank: Place the zone near center so Runic Mark targets can clear while spread.
advice.healer: Time instant healing before stepping into the zone; you cannot cast while silenced/pacified.
advice.dps: Do not sit inside the zone early; enter late to dodge Wave of Silence, then exit.

advice.generic: Runic Mark targets should clear in Suppression Zone while staying separated from each other so Null Reaction does not double-hit the group.
advice.tank: Keep the boss/zone near the center so both targets can clear without crossing the group.
advice.healer: The second Runic Mark clear may need extra healing or a defensive because Null Reaction can chain with other damage.
advice.dps: If marked, move decisively to the zone and leave a gap from the other marked player.

advice.generic: Unstable Energy stacks from soaking Energy Orbs; soak what is needed but use defensives and do not chain too many stacks unnecessarily.
advice.healer: Expect heavy spot healing during orb soaking and watch players with high Unstable Energy stacks.
advice.dps: Use damage cooldowns during Refueling Protocol, soak assigned orbs, then move out before stacks become dangerous.

1245068.name: Consuming Void

advice.generic: Consuming Void is a dangerous Magic debuff; remove what you can and use personals if too many are active for one dispel cooldown.
advice.healer: Dispel the highest-risk target first and heal/externals through remaining debuffs.
advice.dps: Use personals if you are not the first dispel target; do not assume every application can be instantly removed.

1245068.notes: Dangerous Magic debuff; dispel promptly, use defensives if applications overlap.

advice.generic: Null Reaction is the punishment when Runic Mark is cleared; stagger/space the clears so multiple hits do not stack on the party.
advice.healer: Prepare spot healing for the second clear and call if players are clearing too close together.
advice.dps: Marked players should not both clear on top of each other; leave room before removing the mark.

advice.generic: Void Bomb targets a player with a healing absorb/splash; spread from allies and help remove the absorb with self-healing if possible.
advice.healer: Heal the absorb off quickly, especially if multiple Void Bombs or Devouring Strike overlap.
advice.dps: If targeted, step away from allies and use defensives/self-healing to help clear the absorb.

advice.generic: Pyroblast must be interrupted; the mob is CC-immune, so assign real kicks rather than relying on stops.
advice.healer: Prepare spot healing only if a kick is missed; successful play is preventing the cast.
advice.dps: Keep an interrupt rotation and do not waste kicks on low-priority casts when Pyroblast is coming.

advice.generic: Flamestrike creates an AoE hit and puddle; move out before impact and do not drop it in the route path.
advice.healer: Be ready when Flamestrike overlaps Ignition or other library trash damage.
advice.dps: Interrupt Pyroblast first, but still move out of Flamestrike immediately.

1255187.name: Holy Fire

advice.generic: Holy Fire is a Magic DoT from trash; dispel promptly to keep random damage from compounding.
advice.healer: Cleanse Holy Fire when it lands unless saving dispel for a more lethal mechanic.
advice.dps: Interrupt/stop the caster where possible and use off-dispel utility if your class can remove Magic.

1255187.notes: Magic DoT; dispel promptly to limit avoidable damage.

1264687.name: Devouring Strike

advice.generic: Devouring Strike is a tank healing absorb, not a cleanse. The answer is mitigation, self-healing, externals, and focused healing.
advice.tank: Use a defensive/self-healing before or during the hit so the absorb does not bury the healer.
advice.healer: Commit focused healing into the absorb quickly; do not waste a dispel expecting it to clear.
advice.dps: Use stops or damage reduction utility to reduce follow-up pressure while the tank absorb is being healed off.

1264687.notes: Large tank healing absorb; heal through it rather than scoring as a cleanse.

advice.generic: Terror Wave should be interrupted every time; if it goes off, be ready for the dangerous debuff/CC and possible line-of-sight handling.
advice.healer: Dispel quickly if the cast completes and creates a removable debuff.
advice.dps: Prioritize this over filler casts; assign kicks before the pull if multiple Void Infusers are present.

advice.generic: Hulking Fragment hits the tank and applies a Magic DoT/puddle pattern; the tank should move out before dispel so the puddle drops away from melee.
advice.tank: Aim the hit away from allies, back away after the hit, and call for dispel once you are out of melee space.
advice.healer: Wait until the tank is out before dispelling so the puddle lands away from the group.
advice.dps: Give the tank room to move out; do not chase into the dispel puddle drop zone.

advice.generic: Arcane Beam tracks/channels into a player and leaves puddles; guide it away from the group path and avoid the trail.
advice.tank: Keep enemies positioned so the beam target has a safe path out and melee are not boxed in.
advice.healer: Watch the beam target while they move; the danger is often beam plus knockback/other puddles.
advice.dps: If targeted, move the beam away from allies and avoid painting the group path.

1282055.name: Ethereal Shackles

advice.generic: Ethereal Shackles pins the target; remove it before overlapping movement mechanics.
advice.tank: If you are rooted, call for freedom/dispels before tank movement is required.
advice.healer: Prioritize dispel when the root would trap someone in Arcane Residue, beams, or knockbacks.
advice.dps: Break yourself out if your class can; do not wait in a lethal overlap.

1282055.notes: Magic root; dispel or root-break to avoid being pinned in mechanics.

advice.generic: Cosmic Sting drops a puddle under the target; place it away from the center and away from linked movement paths.
advice.tank: Keep clones/boss positioned so puddles do not split the arena for melee.
advice.healer: Spot heal the target if puddle movement overlaps other boss focus damage.
advice.dps: If targeted, drop the puddle out of the way and return to cleave quickly.

1284627.name: Umbral Splinters

advice.generic: Umbral Splinters is a dangerous removable debuff; dispel promptly and use a personal if dispel is delayed.
advice.healer: Prioritize the target if the debuff overlaps group damage.
advice.dps: Use self-dispel/defensive utility if your class can answer it.

1284627.notes: Discovered from logs (cleared by Detox). Magic debuff; dispel promptly.
